## RuntimeContext.fillings property

A searchable library of all fillings, keyed by composite ID. Fillings are resolved eagerly on first access and cached.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get fillings(): IReadOnlyValidatingLibrary<FillingId, RuntimeFillingRecipe, IFillingRecipeQuerySpec>;
```
